channel.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Aug 1st - Aug 7th, 2022
item.description:
Papers

  • The Road to Vulkan: Teaching Modern Low-Level APIs in Introductory Graphics Courses by Johannes Unterguggenberger, Bernhard Kerbl, and Michael Wimmer, Eurographics 2022 - Education Papers
    • Direct link to the paper.
    • Pre-recorded presentation on YouTube.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Jul 25th - Jul 31st, 2022
item.description:
Tutorial

  • Vulkan Lecture Series - University lectures by Johannes Unterguggenberger from the Research Unit of Computer Graphics, TU Wien. Covers basic and advanced topics like: Vulkan essentials, the swap chain, resources and descriptors, commands and command buffers, pipelines and stages, real-time ray tracing, and synchronization.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Mar 21st - Mar 27th, 2022
item.description:
Apps

  • DDraceNetworkstars353 - Cooperative 2D platformer with optional Vulkan backend. - zlib website

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Nov 22nd - Nov 28th, 2021
item.description:
Tools

  • Open Capture and Analytics Tool (OCAT)stars211 - provides an FPS overlay and performance measurement for D3D11, D3D12, and Vulkan. [MIT]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Aug 2nd - Aug 8th, 2021
item.description:
Tutorial

  • Vulkan Game Engine Tutorial - Tutorial series on making a vulkan game engine by Brendan Galea on YouTube.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Jun 21st - Jun 27th, 2021
item.description:
Bindings

  • Vortice.Vulkanstars171 - .NET Standard 2.0 and .NET5 C# bindings [MIT]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Jun 14th - Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
Bindings

  • Silk.NETstars2.2k - C# bindings for Vulkan and others. [MIT]

    • Tools

  • VKtracer - universal and easy-to-use profiler for Vulkan.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Apr 26th - May 2nd, 2021
item.description:
Bindings

  • gfx-rsstars5.2k - A low-overhead Vulkan-like GPU API for Rust. [Apache License 2.0]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Mar 8th - Mar 14th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

  • 2D
    • imguistars42.2k - Immediate Mode Graphical User interface. [MIT]
    • Skia - Google's 2D graphics library has a Vulkan backend, demonstrated in a cross-platform sample application with its own window library. [BSD 3-clause] website
    • VKVGstars574 - Vulkan 2D graphics library, API follows the same pattern as Cairo graphics lib, but with new functions.
  • Compute
    • libvcstars127 - Vulkan Compute for C++. [LICENSE]
    • Vulkan Komputestars972 - Blazing fast and lightweight Vulkan Compute Framework optimized for advanced GPU processing usecases. [Apache License 2.0]
    • ncnnstars15.7k - High-performance neural network inference framework with Vulkan based GPU inference. [BSD 3-clause]
    • vuhstars318 - Vulkan-based C++ GPGPU computing framework. [MIT]
    • VkFFTstars915 - Efficient Vulkan FFT library [MPL-2.0 License]
  • Low Level
    • Vulkan Memory Allocatorstars1.8k - Easy to integrate Vulkan memory allocation library from AMD. [MIT]
      • [VulkanMemoryAllocator-Hpp] (https://github.com/malte-v/VulkanMemoryAllocator-Hppstars37) - C++ Bindings for VMA, like Vulkan-HPP
    • Fossilizestars32 - serialization format for various persistent Vulkan object types. [MIT]
    • vk-bootstrapstars397 - C++ utility library to jump start Vulkan development by automating instance, physical device, device, and swapchain creation. [MIT]
    • Google's vulkan-cpp-librarystars250 - Vulkan abstraction library using C++11 for memory, resource management, type and thread safety as well as system independency. [Apache]
    • FrameGraphstars362 - Vulkan abstraction layer that represent frame as a task graph. [BSD 2-clause]
    • V-EZstars778 - light-weight middleware layer for the Vulkan API targeting Professional Workstation ISVs. [MIT]
    • Vookoostars449 - Vookoo is a set of dependency-free utilities to assist in the construction and updating of Vulkan graphics data structres. [MIT]
    • vppstars261 - Modern C++ Vulkan Abstraction focused on performance and a straightforward interface. [MIT]
    • VulkanSceneGraph - Vulkan/C++17 scene graph project, successor to OpenSceneGraph.
    • Vulkan-WSIWindowstars100 - Multi-platform library to create a Vulkan window, and handle input events. [Apache License 2.0]
    • Screen 13stars87 - An easy-to-use Vulkan render graph for Rust. [MIT]
  • Frameworks, Engines, Higher Level Rendering
    • Auto-Vkstars108 - Vulkan convenience and productivity layer for modern C++, atop Vulkan-Hpp, by the Research Unit of Computer Graphics, TU Wien. [MIT]
    • Auto-Vk-Toolkitstars209 - C++ framework around Auto-Vkstars108 for rapid prototyping, research, and teaching, by the Research Unit of Computer Graphics, TU Wien. [MIT for the framework's code]
    • Falcorstars1.8k - Real-time rendering framework from NVIDIA, supporting mainly DX12, with experimental Vulkan support. [BSD 3-clause]
    • The-Forgestars3.2k - DirectX 12, Vulkan, macOS Metal 2 rendering framework. [Apache License 2.0]
    • Diligent Enginestars2.5k - a modern cross-platform low-level graphics library that supports OpenGL/GLES, Direct3D11/12 and Vulkan. [Apache License 2.0]
    • DemoFrameworkstars173 - NXP GTEC C++11 cross-platform demo framework including lots of samples for Vulkan, OpenGL ES, OpenVX, OpenCL, OpenVG and OpenCV. [BSD-3-clause]
    • bgfxstars12.2k - Cross-platform, graphics API agnostic, "Bring Your Own Engine/Framework" style rendering library. [BSD-2-clause]
    • Cinderstars5k and the story behind. [BSD]
    • openFrameworksstars64 - the most famouse C++ creative coding framework. [MIT]
    • bsfstars1.7k - Modern C++14 library for the development of real-time graphical applications. [MIT]
    • glfwstars9.7k and the guide. [LICENSE]
    • SDL - added cross-platform Vulkan graphics support in SDL_vulkan.h. [zlib]
    • Acidstars1.4k - A high speed C++17 Vulkan game engine. [MIT]
    • liblavastars549 - A modern C++ and easy-to-use framework. [MIT]
    • AMD's Anvilstars565 - cross-platform framework for Vulkan. [LICENSE]
    • Introductory Vulkan samplestars104. [MIT]
    • Intrinsic Enginestars1k - Intrinsic is a Vulkan based cross-platform graphics and game engine. [Apache License 2.0]
    • Spectrumstars15 - Work-in-progress framework and abstraction layer around Vulkan.
    • VkHLFstars326 - Vulkan High Level Framework. [LICENSE]
    • Lugdunumstars235 - Modern cross-platform 3D rendering engine built with Vulkan and modern C++14. [MIT]
    • Pumexstars284 - cross-platform Vulkan renderer implementing frame graph and simple scene graph. Able to render on many surfaces at once [MIT]
    • small3d, Tiny Vulkan based C++ cross-platform game development framework [BSD 3-clause]
    • Logistars11 - Light-weight object oriented Vulkan abstraction framework. [BSD 2-clause]
    • PowerVR SDKstars583 - C++ cross-platform 3D graphics SDK to speed up development of Vulkan and GLES. [LICENSE]
  • Other API Interop and Implementations
    • visorstars37 - Vulkan Ignoble Software Rasterizer. [MIT]
    • VulkanOnD3D12 - Vulkan API for D3D12. [Apache License 2.0]
    • rostkatzestars80 - C++ implementation of Vulkan sitting on D3D12 🐈[Apache License 2.0]
    • VK9 - Direct3D 9 compatibility layer using Vulkan
    • VUDAstars439 - header-only lib that provides a CUDA Runtime API interface. [MIT]
    • clspvstars493 - prototype compiler for a subset of OpenCL C to Vulkan compute shaders. [Apache License 2.0]
    • MoltenVKstars3.6k - run Vulkan on iOS and macOS. [Apache-2.0]
    • Zink - OpenGL implementation on top of Vulkan, part of Mesa project. [MIT]
    • glo / OpenGL Overloadstars277 - OpenGL implementation on top of Vulkan.
    • gfx-portabilitystars354 - Vulkan Portability implementation on Metal and D3D12, based on gfx-rsstars5.2k.
  • Raytracing
    • Quartzstars406 - Physically based Vulkan RTX path tracer with a declarative ES7-like scene description language. [LGPL-3.0]
  • Scientific
    • datovizstars393 - High-performance GPU interactive scientific data visualization with Vulkan. [MIT]
    • iMSTK - C++ toolkit for building surgical simulations with Vulkan and VTK backends. [Apache License 2.0]
  • Shaders
    • glslangstars2.3k - Library for compiling glsl to spirv [BSD 3-Clause]
    • SPIRV-Crossstars1.5k - Library for reflection of spirv, simplify the creation of Vulkan pipeline layouts [ Apache-2.0 License]

    • Bindings

  • VK²stars98, Kotlin Wrapper for Vulkan: code expressiveness and safety meet graphic power [Apache License 2.0]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Dec 28th - Jan 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Bindings

  • vulkan-zigstars184 - Vulkan binding generator for Zig [MIT]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Dec 21st - Dec 27th, 2020
item.description:
Document

  • LunarG
    • Vulkan SDK
    • Vulkan SDK Version Compatibility
    • Introducing the New Vulkan Configurator
    • Unified Validation Layer for Vulkan
    • Vulkan Synchronization Validation Quick Start Guide
    • Guide to Vulkan Synchronization Validation
    • Vulkan GPU-Assisted Validation
    • Automatic RelaxedPrecision Decoration and Conversion in Spirv-Opt
    • SPIR-V Legalization and Size Reduction with spirv-opt
    • All White Papers

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Nov 16th - Nov 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • Qualcomm Adreno GPU Tools - samples, Adreno recommendation layer, best practice docs for Adreno GPU.
  • Qualcomm Snapdragon Profiler - includes Vulkan traces and frame captures for Adreno GPU.

item.description:

  • Vulkan Guide. [MIT]

  • Discord

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Sep 7th - Sep 13th, 2020
item.description:
Apps

  • Q2RTXstars1k - NVIDIA’s implementation of RTX ray-tracing in Quake II. [LICENSE]

    • Tools

  • MangoHudstars4.1k - Vulkan and OpenGL overlay for monitoring FPS, temperatures, CPU/GPU load. [MIT]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Jun 8th - Jun 14th, 2020
item.description:
Bindings

  • vulkanstars119 - Haskell bindings for Vulkan and Vulkan Memory Allocator [BSD-3-Clause]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Mar 30th - Apr 5th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • glsl_tracestars27 - library for shader debugging and profiling for Vulkan and OpenGL. [MIT]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Feb 24th - Mar 1st, 2020
item.description:
Samples

  • Sascha Willems's samplesstars7.9k and Deferred rendering of Sponzastars154 and his talk of Khronos_meetup_munich.

    • Document

  • Samsung
    • Siggraph 2016 - Best Practices for Mobile
    • Vulkan Usage Recommencation (for mobile)

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Feb 17th - Feb 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Bindings

  • PasVulkanstars158 - Vulkan bindings plus high-level wrapper library for Object Pascal [Zlib]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Document

  • Khronos
    • Vulkan Guidestars1.3k

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Jan 6th - Jan 12th, 2020
item.description:
Tutorial

  • Mike Bailey's Vulkan Page - Provides extensive Vulkan course slides. [CC BY-NC-ND 4.0]

    • Bindings

  • ash - Vulkan bindings for Rust. [MIT]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Oct 21st - Oct 27th, 2019
item.description:
Bindings

  • racket-vulkanstars40 - Racket bindings for Vulkan with detailed implementation notes. [MIT]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Oct 14th - Oct 20th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • Arm Mobile Studio - includes the Arm Graphics Analyzer to trace graphics performance issues easily, and Arm Streamline performance analyzer, for a whole-system view of performance to determine bottlenecks quickly across both the CPU and GPU.
  • Arm - PerfDocstars111 - a validation layer against the Mali Application Developer Best Practices document. [MIT]

    • Hardware Support

  • Arm
    • Mali GPU Best Practices

    • Document

  • Arm
    • Vulkan Best Practice for Mobile Developers Tutorialsstars518
    • Vulkan's Key Features on Arm Architecture
    • Porting a Graphics Engine to the Vulkan API
    • Get Your Engine Ready for Vulkan on Mobile
    • Multi-Threading in Vulkan
    • Mali Vulkan SDK Tutorials and Slides

    • Samples

  • Vulkan Best Practice for Mobile Developers Samplesstars518

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Apr 15th - Apr 21st, 2019
item.description:
Samples

  • (Incomplete) Sascha Willems's samples portstars47 to Kotlin

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Apr 8th - Apr 14th, 2019
item.description:

  • nvkstars871 - JavaScript bindings for Vulkan. [MIT]

item.description:

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Jan 21st - Jan 27th, 2019
item.description:
Apps

  • vkQuake2stars737 - id Software's Quake 2 v3.21 with Vulkan support (Windows and Linux). [GPL]
  • q2vkptstars940 - Real-time path tracer VKPT integrated into q2pro Quake 2 client. [gpl]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Dec 24th - Dec 30th, 2018
item.description:
Bindings

  • vulkan-gostars649 - Go bindings for Vulkan. [MIT]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Nov 19th - Nov 25th, 2018
item.description:
Tutorial

  • Vulkan Demos and Tutorialsstars68. [MIT]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Oct 22nd - Oct 28th, 2018
item.description:
Tutorial

  • Moving to Vulkan (Khronos UK May16)

    • Samples

  • LunarG's Samplesstars1.3k

    • Khronos

  • Specification
    • Vulkan 1.0 Core API (Chunked HTML) (PDF) (Single-file HTML)
    • Vulkan 1.0 Core API + Khronos-defined Extensions (Chunked HTML) (PDF) (Single-file HTML)
    • Vulkan 1.0 Core API + all registered Extensions (Chunked HTML) (PDF) (Single-file HTML)
    • Vulkan 1.1 Core API (Chunked HTML) (PDF) (Single-file HTML)
    • Vulkan 1.1 Core API + Khronos-defined Extensions (Chunked HTML) (PDF) (Single-file HTML)
    • Vulkan 1.1 Core API + all registered Extensions (Chunked HTML) (PDF) (Single-file HTML)
    • Vulkan 1.2 Core API (Chunked HTML) (PDF) (Single-file HTML)
    • Vulkan 1.2 Core API + Khronos-defined Extensions (Chunked HTML) (PDF) (Single-file HTML)
    • Vulkan 1.2 Core API + all registered Extensions (Chunked HTML) (PDF) (Single-file HTML)
    • Vulkan 1.3 Core API (Chunked HTML) (PDF) (Single-file HTML)
    • Vulkan 1.3 Core API + Khronos-defined Extensions (Chunked HTML) (PDF) (Single-file HTML)
    • Vulkan 1.3 Core API + all registered Extensions (Chunked HTML) (PDF) (Single-file HTML)
  • Quick Reference Sheets
    • Vulkan 1.0 Quick Reference Sheets
    • Vulkan 1.1 Quick Reference Sheets
  • Conformance Tests (CTS)stars417
  • Conferences and Presentations
    • GDC 2016 Presentations
    • 2016 UK Chapter: Moving to Vulkan
    • SIGGRAPH 2016 BOF - Vulkan
    • SIGGRPAH 2016 Best Practices Roundtable
    • 2016 Vulkan DevDay UK
    • 2016 Vulkan DevDay Seoul
    • 2017 Vulkan DevU Vancouver
    • 2017 Vulkan Loader Webinar
    • SIGGRAPH 2017 BOF - Vulkan
    • 2018 Vulkan Montreal Dev Day
    • 2018 Vulkanised!
    • SIGGRAPH 2018 BOF - Vulkan

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Oct 1st - Oct 7th, 2018
item.description:
Apps

  • Basemark - by Basemark.

    • Bindings

  • libvulkan.lua - Lua bindings for Vulkan.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Aug 27th - Sep 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Bindings

  • flextGLstars193 - Minimal Vulkan header/loader generator and the blog post about it.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan May 21st - May 27th, 2018
item.description:
Books

  • Vulkan Programming Guide - by Graham Sellers and John Kessenich - Introduces powerful 3D development techniques for many fields.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Apr 9th - Apr 15th, 2018
item.description:
Tutorial

  • How to Learn Vulkan - Meta post on how to learn Vulkan
  • I Am Graphics And So Can You - Blog post style tutorial for those new to graphics learning Vulkan.
  • Qualcomm Video Tutorial Series - Leans more towards Vulkan for mobile devices.
  • Raw Vulkan - Overview on how to program a Vulkan application from the ground up.
  • Tutorial by Overv and its github repositorystars2.3k. [CC BY-SA 4.0]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Feb 19th - Feb 25th, 2018
item.description:
Samples

  • Sascha Willems's Vulkan-glTF-PBRstars631 - physical based rendering with Vulkan using glTF 2.0 models. [MIT]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Jan 1st - Jan 7th, 2018
item.description:
Bindings

  • Vulkanostars3.4k - Safe and rich Rust wrapper around the Vulkan API. [MIT]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Oct 9th - Oct 15th, 2017
item.description:
Books

  • Introduction to Computer Graphics and the Vulkan API by Kenwright - Introduce the reader to the exciting topic of computer graphics from a grounds-up practical perspective with the Vulkan API.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Aug 7th - Aug 13th, 2017
item.description:
Related lists

  • awesomestars222.8k - Curated list of awesome lists.
  • awesome-openglstars1.7k - Curated list of awesome OpenGL libraries, debuggers and resources.
  • gamedevstars10.4k - Awesome list about game development.
  • graphics-resourcesstars1.7k - List of graphic programming resources.
  • awesome-d3d12stars193 - Curated list of awesome D3D12 libraries, debuggers and resources.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Jul 31st - Aug 6th, 2017
item.description:
Tutorial

  • jhenriques's tutorial

    • Tools

  • gapidstars2.1k - Graphics API Debugger, can trace and replay Android OpenGL ES and Vulkan applications. [Apache License 2.0]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan May 1st - May 7th, 2017
item.description:
Community

  • Freenode IRC
  • Google Plus
  • Khronos Forum
  • Reddit
  • Stack Overflow

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Apr 24th - Apr 30th, 2017
item.description:
Books

  • Learning Vulkan - by Parminder Singh - Get started with the Vulkan API and its programming techniques using the easy-to-follow examples.
    • Book's Examplesstars165
  • Vulkan Cookbook- by Pawel Lapinski - Explores a wide range of graphics programming and GPU compute methods to make the best use of the Vulkan API.
    • Book's Examplesstars590

    • Tutorial

  • vulkan-sxsstars15 - explain the Vulkan API step by step and vulkan-syncstars42 - rephrase Vulkan's requirements on execution dependencies in a more precise form. [MIT]

    • Tools

  • LoaderAndValidationLayersstars415 - from KhronosGroup. [Apache Licence 2.0]
  • VulkanToolsstars553 - LunarG's tools including layers, vktrace and vkreplay. [Apache Licence 2.0]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Apr 10th - Apr 16th, 2017
item.description:
Bindings

  • vulkanstars366 - Ultimate Python bindings for Vulkan generated with CFFI. [Apache Licence 2.0]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Mar 27th - Apr 2nd, 2017
item.description:
Bindings

  • SharpVkstars139 - C# bindings for Vulkan with Linq-to-SPIR-V & NuGet package. [MIT]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Mar 20th - Mar 26th, 2017
item.description:
Apps

  • 3DMark - 3DMark API Overhead test.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Feb 20th - Feb 26th, 2017
item.description:
Apps

  • Linux port of SteamVRstars780 - SteamVR is built on top of the Vulkan API.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Nov 7th - Nov 13th, 2016
item.description:
Document

  • AMD
    • Vulkan barriers explained
    • Vulkan Fast Paths
    • Let Your Game Shine – Optimizing DirectX 12 and Vulkan Performance with AMD CodeXL
    • D3D12 & Vulkan: Lessons Learned
    • Say Hello to a New Rendering API in Town!
    • Vulkan Renderpasses
    • Performance tweets series: Barriers, fences, synchronization
    • Using the Vulkan™ Validation Layers
    • Most common mistakes in Vulkan apps
    • Vulkan Device Memory

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Oct 17th - Oct 23rd, 2016
item.description:
Apps

  • vkQuakestars1.4k - Vulkan Quake port based on QuakeSpasm. [GPL]

  • Lunarg's tutorial

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Aug 8th - Aug 14th, 2016

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Jul 4th - Jul 10th, 2016

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan May 30th - Jun 5th, 2016
item.description:
Apps

  • Dota2stars87 - by Valve.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan May 23rd - May 29th, 2016
item.description:
Samples

  • nvpro-samples - NVIDIA DesignWorks Samples. [LICENSE]
    • gl_vk_chopperstars199 - Simple vulkan rendering example.
    • gl_vk_threaded_cadscenestars148 - OpenGL and Vulkan comparison on rendering a CAD scene using various techniques and the blog about it.
    • gl_vk_bk3dthreadedstars79 - Vulkan sample rendering 3D with 'worker-threads'.
    • gl_vk_supersampledstars57 - Vulkan sample showing a high quality super-sampled rendering.

    • Bindings

  • ErupteDstars45 - Another Auto-generated D bindings for Vulkan.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan May 16th - May 22nd, 2016
item.description:
Tutorial

  • Siggraph
    • An overview of next-generation graphics APIs - covers Vulkan, D3D12 etc.
  • Vulkan in 30 minutes - by baldurk.

    • Apps

  • Doom - by id Software.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Apr 18th - Apr 24th, 2016
item.description:
Tools

  • CodeXLstars974 - CodeXL goes open source. [MIT]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Apr 11th - Apr 17th, 2016
item.description:
Samples

  • Google
    • Android port of LunarG samplesstars441.
    • android tutorialsstars718.

    • Document

  • Imagination
    • Efficient Rendering with Vulkan on PowerVR
    • Migrating to Vulkan with the New PowerVR Graphics Framework
    • Migrating from OpenGLES to Vulkan

    • Bindings

  • dvulkanstars16 - Auto-generated D bindings for Vulkan.
  • VulkanSharpstars489 - C# bindings for Vulkan. [MIT]
  • LWJGL - Lightweight Java Game Library 3 has Vulkan bindings. [BSD]

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2016

Apps

  • ProtoStar - by Epic, built with Unreal Engine 4 technology.
  • The Talos Principle - by Croteam.

item.title: vinjn/awesome-vulkan Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2016
item.description:
Document

  • NVIDIA
    • Vulkan Device-Generated Commands
    • Getting Vulkan Ready For VR
    • GPU-Driven Rendering
    • GDC 16 - High-performance, Low-Overhead Rendering with OpenGL and Vulkan
    • GDC 16 - Vulkan and NVIDIA – The Essentials
    • Engaging the Voyage to Vulkan
    • Vulkan Shader Resource Binding
    • Vulkan Memory Management
    • OpenGL like Vulkan
    • Transitioning from OpenGL to Vulkan
    • Siggraph 15 talk - Vulkan on NVIDIA GPUs

    • Tools

  • renderdocstars6.8k - by baldurk, a stand-alone graphics debugging tool. [MIT]
    • RDCtoVkCppstars22 - converts RenderDoc Vulkan capture to compilable and executable C++ code. [MIT]

    • Samples

  • vkcubestars85 - 'vkcube' sample from krh, works under X, wayland and VT console with

    • Hardware Support

  • gpuinfo - Vulkan Hardware Database by Sascha Willems
  • NVIDIA
    • Driver for Desktop
    • Driver for Android
    • Driver for Linux for Tegra (L4T)
  • Qualcomm

    • SDK

  • For Windows & Linux
  • For Android
